title: Infection
description: A staged infection identity (FR-INJ-05..08 · GDD Part VI). Static, content-as-data definition of a sickness the survivor reads only from symptoms — never a bar. The engine (sim/infection.ts) holds the authoritative mechanical dials; this file is the canonical mirror validated in CI, and a harness drift-guard test asserts the two never diverge (the T40 arc pattern). A live infection (its hidden progression, its current stage) lives in GameState.player.condition.infection.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint pointing at this schema.

id.description: Stable content id of the form infection.<slug>, e.g. "infection.bite".

name.description: Player-facing name of the sickness (ICU MessageFormat string).

description.description: What the infection is and how it behaves (author/design reference).

source.description: How this infection is contracted (GDD VI Sources). Only 'bite' is driven in the engine today; the staged machine is source-agnostic and ready for the rest.

stages.description: The staged identity, in order. Mirrors the engine's INFECTION_STAGES / CURE_BY_STAGE / QUARANTINE_BY_STAGE; a drift-guard test keeps them byte-identical.

key.description: The engine stage key. 'incubating' is the GDD's asymptomatic stage.

label.description: Human-readable stage label for design docs.

symptom.description: What the player FEELS at this stage — the honest status read (never a number). Absent for asymptomatic (incubating): nothing to feel yet.

sign.description: What OTHERS see on the player — the visible sign NPCs react to. Absent while asymptomatic.

cure.description: The antibiotics cure at this stage. 'The deeper it goes, the costlier and less certain the cure' (FR-INJ-07).

amount.description: Hidden progression removed on a full/certain application.

partial.description: Progression removed when the (late-stage) roll falls short.

certaintyPercent.description: Odds of the full effect (100 = certain, no RNG draw).

quarantine.description: Progression a shelter quarantine (clean conditions, no meds) removes at this stage. 0 at terminal — clean conditions alone can't beat the late body.

notes.description: Author commentary (JSON has no comments, ADR-0002).
